description: E-Commerce аналитика: воронка заказов, GMV, топ товаров (ClickHouse)

panels.title: Заказы по статусам (воронка)
panels.description: Количество событий каждого типа. Показывает воронку: placed → paid → shipped → delivered и % отмен.

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_type, count(DISTINCT event_id) as cnt FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_date >= today() - 30 GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

panels.title: GMV по дням (Gross Merchandise Value)
panels.description: Общая сумма заказов (order.placed) по дням в рублях. GMV = сумма всех оформленных заказов.

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_date as time, sum(total_amount) / 100 as gmv_rub FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_type = 'order.placed' AND event_date >= today() - 30 GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date

panels.title: Средний чек
panels.description: Средняя сумма заказа за последние 30 дней.

targets.rawSql: SELECT avg(total_amount) / 100 as avg_check FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_type = 'order.placed' AND event_date >= today() - 30

panels.title: Всего заказов
panels.description: Общее количество оформленных заказов за 30 дней.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT event_id) as total_orders FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_type = 'order.placed' AND event_date >= today() - 30

panels.title: % отмен
panels.description: Процент отменённых заказов от общего числа оформленных.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(countIf(event_type = 'order.cancelled') * 100.0 / countIf(event_type = 'order.placed'), 1) as cancel_rate FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_date >= today() - 30

panels.title: Конверсия воронки
panels.description: Процент перехода между этапами: placed→paid, paid→shipped, shipped→delivered.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(countIf(event_type = 'order.paid') * 100.0 / countIf(event_type = 'order.placed'), 1) as paid_rate FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_date >= today() - 30

panels.title: Топ-10 товаров по количеству продаж
panels.description: Самые продаваемые товары за последние 30 дней (по количеству единиц).

targets.rawSql: SELECT product_name, sum(quantity) as total_sold, sum(price_amount * quantity) / 100 as revenue_rub, count(DISTINCT order_id) as orders_count FROM analytics.order_item_events WHERE event_date >= today() - 30 GROUP BY product_name ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Заказы по дням (по типу события)
panels.description: Динамика событий заказов по дням с разбивкой по типу.

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_date as time, event_type, count(DISTINCT event_id) as cnt FROM analytics.order_events WHERE event_date >= today() - 30 GROUP BY event_date, event_type ORDER BY event_date

title: RTS E-Commerce Analytics
